subject: Project Management
title: PMBOK and PMI
description: A micro-lesson that makes PMBOK and PMI usable.

hook.text: In 1996, the Project Management Institute published PMBOK — the PM profession's bible.

buildup.text: PMBOK organized project management into five process groups and ten knowledge areas.

discovery.text: The PMP certification became the gold standard — over a million professionals hold it.

twist.text: Critics say PMBOK is too rigid — better suited for construction than software.

climax.text: The 7th edition in 2021 finally embraced Agile and adaptive approaches.

punchline.text: The rulebook finally admitted rules aren't enough.

quiz.question: What change did the 7th edition of PMBOK introduce?
options: It embraced Agile and adaptive approaches
It doubled the number of knowledge areas
